name: Canvas2D Horizontal Shooter
description: Reusable, config-driven horizontal side-scrolling arcade shooter: keyboard-controlled ship, parallax background layers, enemy formations entering from the right, enemy bullet patterns (straight/aimed/spread), collisions, score, lives, power-ups, game over and restart. Procedural fallback sprites when no assets are mapped. Standalone browser export.
capabilities: horizontal right-to-left scrolling with parallax layers (starfield / color / image)
keyboard player movement within screen bounds + forward shooting
named enemy formations: line, column, vee, random
enemy movement patterns: straight, sine, drift
enemy bullet patterns: straight, aimed, spread
AABB collisions with player hitbox scale
score with kill multiplier and wave-clear bonus
lives, respawn invulnerability, game over, restart
procedural fallback sprites with configurable enemy shape (ship/box/circle/diamond/triangle)
standalone export (relative paths, no server calls)
constraints: vanilla HTML/CSS/JS only — no Node, npm or frameworks
configuration-driven: generators produce JSON matching schema.json, never runtime code
relative asset paths only; missing sprites fall back to procedural drawings
